GitHubApiData.name: sublime-self-patcher
GitHubApiData.description: Sublime Text 4 plugin which can patch Sublime Text and Sublime Merge.

TranslatedDescriptions.zh-CN: Sublime Text 4 插件，可修补 Sublime Text 和 Sublime Merge。
TranslatedDescriptions.ja: Sublime TextおよびSublime Mergeをパッチ適用できるSublime Text 4プラグイン。
TranslatedDescriptions.ko: Sublime Text와 Sublime Merge를 패치할 수 있는 Sublime Text 4 플러그인입니다.
TranslatedDescriptions.en: Sublime Text 4 plugin that can patch Sublime Text and Sublime Merge.
TranslatedDescriptions.es: Plugin para Sublime Text 4 que puede parchear Sublime Text y Sublime Merge.
TranslatedDescriptions.fr: Plugin Sublime Text 4 capable de patcher Sublime Text et Sublime Merge.
